note: 25 reports analyzed. Tickers represent 13D's highest-conviction recurring picks.

tickers.name: Bitcoin
tickers.thesis: Nation-state accumulation thesis. Strategic reserve. Trump presidency = regulatory clarity. 10.1% max weighting in HCI. 'We are entering a new era of nation-state accumulation of Bitcoin.'

tickers.name: Agnico Eagle Mines
tickers.thesis: FCF more than doubled in 2024. $1.54B FCF in first 9 months. AISC margin $1,000–$1,500/oz at $2,600+ gold. Operating leverage thesis confirmed in the numbers.

tickers.name: Alamos Gold
tickers.thesis: FCF flipped from -$15.2M deficit to +$218.8M in 9 months. Lowest-cost miner in 13D HGAX Index. AISC margin now $1,000+/oz. Massive operating leverage.

tickers.name: Orla Mining
tickers.thesis: 'Large enough to attract a major.' One of the lowest-cost gold producers. FCF more than doubled. Broke out to highest level Oct 2024. M&A target.

tickers.name: VanEck Gold Miners ETF
tickers.thesis: Senior gold miners at 43% P/NAV discount. Junior gold miners at 73% P/NAV discount. Breakout confirmed Oct 2024. HUI-to-gold ratio approaching 30-year nadir.

tickers.name: Amplify Junior Silver Miners ETF
tickers.thesis: Silver bull market historical analog: 1974-1980 silver +1,412%. 2008-2011 silver +440% vs gold +166%. 3x conviction since Aug 2024. Junior miners = maximum leverage to silver.

tickers.name: Global X Silver Miners ETF
tickers.thesis: Broader silver miner exposure. Catch-up trade to gold. Silver as potential FX reserve asset in dedollarization thesis.

tickers.name: Global X Copper Miners ETF
tickers.thesis: Copper demand up 70% by 2050. $250B capex gap 2024–2035 (BHP). Recycled copper will disappoint. 3x conviction since March 2024. Technical breakout confirmed Oct 2024.

tickers.name: BHP Group
tickers.thesis: World's premier copper miner. Deep dive from Escondida mine conference. 15% production decline from existing mines. $250B capex gap. Direct play on structural copper deficit.

tickers.name: VanEck Oil Services ETF
tickers.thesis: OIH-to-crude ratio in 2.5-year uptrend. Bullish triangle consolidation. SLB acquiring Champion X = M&A consolidation signal. Oil services super-cycle. 7% in HCI.

tickers.name: SPDR Oil & Gas E&P ETF
tickers.thesis: +115.4% since Feb 2021 vs ICLN -48.8%. Energy paradigm shift thesis. Structural energy demand not going away.

tickers.name: Cameco
tickers.thesis: Largest non-state-owned uranium producer. World's highest-quality uranium mines (Athabasca Basin). Uranium supercycle. Trump nuclear policy = accelerant. AI energy demand nexus.

tickers.name: AeroVironment
tickers.thesis: Switchblade loitering munitions. Dec 2024 pullback = buying opportunity. 13D Defense Index at 9.8x cash flow vs. historical median ~12x. Drone warfare secular trend.

tickers.name: Palantir Technologies
tickers.thesis: Palantir AI Platform (AIP) model-agnostic. Connects LLMs with enterprise/government operational data. Leader in AI data analytics for government and commercial clients.

tickers.name: Advanced Micro Devices
tickers.thesis: Leading GPU chip producer prioritizing energy efficiency. AMD's latest GPU 2.2x more efficient than prior generation. Answer to AI energy problem. AI-energy nexus thesis.

tickers.name: Novo Nordisk
tickers.thesis: Ozempic/Wegovy on track to become world's best-selling drug. GLP-1 expanding beyond diabetes to cardiovascular, sleep apnea, liver disease. Structural winner.

tickers.name: Eli Lilly
tickers.thesis: GLP-1 expansion: sleep apnea, cardiovascular risk, liver disease. Will not 'bankrupt the healthcare system' — reduces downstream costs. Structural secular winner.
